title: rAuth
description: Advance Authorization Plugin For Minecraft Paper Servers.
body:
# 🛡️ rAuth > **_Fast, secure authentication plugin for Paper, Spigot & Bukkit servers Provides 70+ Features And 10+ Custom Commands (Requires "ProtocolLib, Floodgate & FastLogin")_**


(Join for Custom Plugins & reporting Bugs!)

# ✨ Key Features - > **Integrated Auth Suite** ![Advanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60941929d21c42ea9fa65b227c03537549a9cd8d.jpeg) - > **Dual-Stage Spawning** ![DualStageSpawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec53e029d8f35870d51b5db8ca47abbcd21f0a30.jpeg) - > **Auto Login Via IP** ![AutoLoginByIpDetection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6378e85f62759b30f1d01c2cd045e3f3e5f314_0.webp) - > **The "Freeze & Invisible" State For Unauthenticated players** ![FreezAndBlind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60c34be9e59d6a06ac5a02b546ecf755876d3340_0.webp) - > **Security Auto-Kick After a Particular Time** ![Kick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef7621aeb54874d3e771931789b9b475d4e9b3f1_0.webp) - > Admin Can See The History of Auth By `/auth` command ![AuthHistory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df844f148ee27705b8f7568b20a96a80b58c40eb_0.webp) - > **Admins can unregister anyone by `/unregister ` command** ![Unregister](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d16d9bcf5c4b8312a527d2354a7aef53a510f36e_0.webp) - > Admins Can See Blocked Ip by `/blockedips` Command ![BlockedIPs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff1eea45d4810db02bd0de28d557e9da1057d3a2_0.webp) - > **Admins Can Blacklist & Whitelist Any Particular IP Through Config** ![IpWhitelistandBlackList](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5f8e8fd96107561bf28600752b63714955e47b9.png) - > **Everything Customizable From Config Folder** ![Customizable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfcf0892d3b0395ef8dde7efd35ca6830d09e2b1.png) - > **And More!** # 🛠️ Commands & Permissions ## 👑 Admin Commands - `/setauthspawn` **— Set login spawn** - `/setmainspawn` **— Set main spawn** - `/blockedips` **— **List of Blocked IPs**** - `/auth `**— Check auth history** - `/clearloginattempts ` **— Unregister any player** ## 📝 Player Commands - `/register ` **— Create your account.** - `/login ` **— Unlock your character.** - `/changepass ` **— Change your existing password securely.** ## 🚀 Installation 1. Downloade the plugin 2. Upload the plugin to your server's plugins folder. 1. Restart the server. 1. Set your spawns in-game using the admin commands. ![rAuth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d649de1e807a190f2c2fe2739f8f06d7891a123.png) > **For Reporthing Bugs Join Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/chTuJRvz3t) Server.**
